Thank you for reporting a bug with the LanguageDetector API in Microsoft Edge.

If you want to share feedback, ask questions, or discuss about your use case intead of reporting a bug, please add a comment to [issue #1274 [LanguageDetector API] Feedback for the LanguageDetector API developer preview in Microsoft Edge](https://github.com/MicrosoftEdge/MSEdgeExplainers/issues/1274).

Before reporting your bug, check the [LanguageDetector API documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/microsoft-edge/web-platform/languagedetector-api), which includes instructions about how to enable the API in Microsoft Edge.

### Bug description

Enter a description of the issue you encountered, and state what you expected to happen instead.
